title: Freshly Grilled Kebabish Lamb Crumble
description: This fresh and fluffy Venezuelan dish features lamb shoulder in a unique blend of dumplings (dum) and plant-based-friendly elements.

ingredients.name: Lamb Shoulder
ingredients.notes: Bone-in for added flavor and tenderness.

ingredients.name: Dum
ingredients.notes: Use a store-bought or homemade version, preferably in small portions.

instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Season the lamb shoulder with salt and pepper on both sides.
Place the dum and seitan evenly spaced around the lamb shoulder on the grill.
Grill the lamb shoulder, turning occasionally for even cooking (about 30-45 minutes), until internal temperature reaches at least 145°F (63°C).
Once cooked, let it rest for a few minutes before slicing into kebabish style.
Serve with fresh herbs and a side of your favorite sauce or spread.
